title: Molecular Diagnostics in Pediatric Pathology Practice: Current Trends and Development.
author_string: Surrey, Lea F, Church, Alanna J, Nelson, Nya D
abstract: Molecular diagnostics are rapidly evolving to support the diagnosis, prognosis, and treatment of pediatric disease. This article summarizes the recent clinically relevant technology advances and their application to constitutional, mosaic, and somatic disorders. The pathologist's role in selecting adequate tissue for genomic testing is also discussed with a review of common pitfalls.
